calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-13-13 At 10:20 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eileen Simon of the Law Offices of Esra Jung (408.556.0300) for Respondents/Plaintiffs who are also present;
Jodie G. Steinberg of the Law Offices of Clasen Raffalow & Rhoads (877.707.7992) for Appellant/Defendant who is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are affirmed.

Byonghan Koh testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondents' 7 - Photo of area of accident
Respondents' 1 - estimate for vehicle repair
Respondents' 2 - 4 photos of vehicle damage
Respondents' 3 - medical record and bill for treatment
Respondents' 8 - check and letter from Farmers
Appellant's 21 (exhibit C to Appellant's trial brief) - Statement of Byonghan Koh
Appellant's 22 (exhibit B to Appellant's trial brief) - photo of Appelant's vehicle
Appellant's 23 (exhibit 6 to Respondents' trial brief) - declaration of insurance

Chung Jin Lee testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondents' 9 - Statement from Juheng Acupuncture Clinic
Respondents' 10 - Statement from Shin Physical Therapy Clinic
Respondents' 12 - Farmers payment for medical treatment
Appellant's 24 (exhibit A to Appellant's trial brief) - Statement of Michelle McCallister

The Court sustains Respondents' objection to admitting Appellant's 24 in evidence.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. The Trial Briefs submitted by the parties are filed without their exhibits, which have been marked for the Court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
